name: Mediterranean Summer Salad
recipeIngredient: 6.5 ounces Can of solid white tuna in water, drained
0.5 pound Green beans, trimmed and blanched to tender crisp
14 ounces Artichoke hearts, drained and quartered
Two tablespoons Thinly sliced sun-dried tomatoes
Small Red onion, cut into thin rings
Two tablespoons Thinly sliced fresh basil
1 teaspoon Anchovy paste or 1 anchovy fillet, mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook tortellini in a large pot of rapidly boiling salted water. Boil for about 25 minutes or until tender, stirring occasionally. Drain.
2. Arrange tuna, tortellini and vegetables on bed of lettuce.
3. In a small bowl, combine vinegar, capers, anchovy paste, mustard, pepper and salt. Slowly whisk oil into the mixture until well combined. Drizzle over salad or serve on the side.
4. Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
